checklist.description: The agent opened and read the stability_task_spec.txt specification file from the Desktop, either in a text editor or terminal.
checklist.evidence: Screenshot showing the spec file content visible in a text editor window or terminal output.

checklist.description: The agent opened the VSPAero analysis dialog (Analysis > VSPAero) to perform the baseline stability assessment on the undersized-tail model.
checklist.evidence: Screenshot showing the VSPAero GUI dialog with Overview tab, solver settings, or Reference tab visible.

checklist.description: The agent configured VSPAero with the correct flight condition: Mach = 0.3 in the Overview tab, Xcg = 28.5 in the Reference tab, and an alpha sweep covering 0 and 6 degrees.
checklist.evidence: Screenshot showing Mach field set to 0.3, or Xcg field set to 28.5, or alpha Start/End fields configured.

checklist.description: The agent ran the VSPAero VLM solver for the baseline (undersized tail) configuration. Solver progress or completion is visible.
checklist.evidence: Screenshot showing solver running (progress messages) or completed (convergence/results visible).

checklist.description: The agent read CL and CMy values from the VSPAero Results Manager, .polar file, or solver output for the baseline configuration.
checklist.evidence: Screenshot showing Results Manager with CL/CMy columns selected, or a text editor/terminal displaying .polar file data with CL and CMy columns.

checklist.description: The agent modified the horizontal tail geometry in the OpenVSP GUI by changing the Span and/or Chord parameters in the Plan, Sect, or Design tab to increase the tail area.
checklist.evidence: Screenshot showing the Tail component selected in Geom Browser and Span/Chord parameters being modified in the geometry editor tabs.

checklist.description: The agent re-ran VSPAero after resizing the tail to verify the new static margin. This confirms a closed-loop design iteration.
checklist.evidence: Screenshot showing VSPAero solver running or completed a second time, or Results Manager showing updated data after tail modification.

checklist.description: The agent created the stability_report.txt file on the Desktop containing iteration data: baseline and final tail dimensions, CL_alpha, CM_alpha, and static margin values.
checklist.evidence: Screenshot showing a text editor or terminal with the report content including numeric static margin values and iteration labels.

checklist.description: The agent saved the final resized model as stability_restored.vsp3 using File > Save As.
checklist.evidence: Screenshot showing the Save As dialog with filename stability_restored.vsp3, or the title bar updated to show the new filename.

integrity_checks.description: The agent used the OpenVSP graphical interface to modify geometry and run VSPAero, rather than editing XML files directly or fabricating results.
The agent actually executed the VSPAero solver (visible solver progress/results), not just opened the dialog without running.
The report contains numeric values that are consistent with actual VSPAero output, not hallucinated or fabricated numbers.

privileged_info: The horizontal tail in the starting model (ecrm_unstable.vsp3) has been scaled to approximately 50% of the original eCRM-001 tail area. The original tail has TotalSpan=192.0 and TotalArea=6336.0; the undersized version has TotalSpan~135.7 and TotalArea~3168.0. The agent must increase the tail size to achieve a static margin between 10% and 20%. The exact required tail size depends on the VSPAero analysis results and cannot be predetermined. The flight condition is Mach=0.3, CG X=28.5, alpha sweep 0-6 degrees.
